sections.paragraph: f. חֲדָשָׁה adj. new, e.g. used of a cart, a threshing wain, 1Sa 6:7 Isa 41:5 of a house, Deu 20:5 22:8 of a wife, Deu 24:5 a king, Exo 1:8 a song, Psal. 33:3 40:4 a name, Isa 62:2. It often means fresh of this year; of grain (opposed to יָשָׁן), Levit. 26:10 unheard of, Ecc 1:9, 10 “new gods,” i.e. such as had not been previously worshipped, Deu 32:17. חֲדָשָׁח “something new,” Isa 43:19, plur. Isa 42:9. As to חָגוּר חֲדָשָׁה 2Sa 21:16, see חָגַר .
